subTitle: Plus-size bride Shireen hates her body so Gok helps her to see herself differently. Heather's fiancé prefers a Meghan Markle-inspired gown, but will she?

subTitle: A young man's bar mitzvah cake is a home run; a Texas-sized cake experiences a crash just hours before delivery; an elaborate cake featuring a life-size snake charms the birthday girl.

title: Ridiculous Cakes
subTitle: My Little Pony comes to life in cake for one lucky girl's horse-themed birthday party; a cake proves to be a real bear for a Portland cake artist; things get messy when a cake artist uses only buttercream to decorate a cake.

subTitle: Time-tested dishes that will never go out of style include Brooke Williamson's favourite French onion soup in Los Angeles, and a bowl of ramen with Jet Tila in New York City.

subTitle: Actress, comedian and foodie Aisha Tyler and Katie Lee Biegel get crafty.

title: Beat Bobby Flay
subTitle: Sunny Anderson and TV host Ross Mathews team up with chefs Kaleena Bliss and Melissa Donahue-Talmage to boil up a win against Bobby Flay.

subTitle: A fun-loving couple is tired of squeezing into their Brooklyn flat, so they're making a move closer to family in Florida. She wants something edgy while he prefers to play it safe, and Brian and Mika must help them decide on a design remotely.

subTitle: The couples reveal details of their most intense moments from the season, with some surprising updates on where things stand now.

subTitle: Brides Liyana and Shaheera must convince their traditional entourages that different can be beautiful. TV host Nina customises her own princess ball gown.

subTitle: Bride Elsa goes through an emotional rollercoaster as she struggles to find her dream dress. Hani wants a colourful gown but her mother wants to tone down her style.

title: Island Life
subTitle: Cindy and Chris from North Carolina have received job offers in Key West, Florida. The temperature there is pleasant all year round. Cindy would like to live right next to the water, but Chris would prefer to live inland.

subTitle: Busy doctors from New Orleans want to take time out. The first-time parents seek a home in family-friendly Hope Town to focus on quality time as a family.

subTitle: It's sink or swim for Randy when reality star Barbara Corcoran comes in. Bridgette needs a dress to say yes in and then run in a Vegas half-marathon!

subTitle: The dietary habits and cuisine of Taiwan, which are a representation of its diverse culture, are something that the Taiwan people take great pride in today In the early days of Taiwan history.

subTitle: Fashion icon Tim Gunn and Carla Hall send chefs Rocco Carulli and Craig Richards down the runway to dress Bobby Flay down.

subTitle: Chef Christian Petroni and actress Kate Flannery from The Office recruit chefs Josh Gale and Christian Ortiz for a hostile takeover of Bobby Flay's kitchen.

subTitle: Kalen Allen and Anne Burrell help chefs Paolo Calamai and Angelo Competiello show Roberto Flay how Tuscan cuisine is done in the old country.

subTitle: Rachel prepares burritos that include many delicious breakfast foods wrapped up in one tortilla; she layers eggs with refried beans, pico de gallo and cheese, plus tater tots with taco spice instead of plain hash browns.

subTitle: Georgia and Richie renovate an outdated sixties house for their clients; Georgia incorporates both functionality and practicality to completely open up and transform the space while giving it a seaside vibe.

subTitle: A cake artist crafts an impressive pinball machine cake that can actually be played; torrential rains threaten a nearly 6-foot-tall ostrich cake; things get sticky when a client orders a gumbo cake for his restaurant anniversary.

title: Ridiculous Cakes
subTitle: A cake artist must deliver a wedding cake worthy of the famed Las Vegas Strip; a cake inspired by music hits a high note; sculpting a penguin out of cake for a child's birthday.

subTitle: From a smoky bacon breakfast bowl to super-saucy barbecued ribs, Southern-inspired spots crush country cooking across the United States.

subTitle: Brian and Mika help a family of four build a home that is just right, but when their plans fall through, they'll have to double down to not disappoint.

subTitle: For the competition finale, Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman create monster cakes; Team Buddy works on a radioactive dinosaur, and Team Duff makes a Frankenstein's monster cake of mismatched doll parts.

subTitle: The last two all-star food truck teams face off in a challenge with special ingredients from Chinatown. The teams compete for every last sale as the clock runs down, and in a thrilling elimination by the bay, host Tyler Florence crowns the winner!
